ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., draft, active, closed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ends */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Target number of respondents */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for sampling */,
  "external_data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source used for integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the client's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, Likert scale) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the question is mandatory */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length of the answer (for open-ended questions) */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the answer (for open-ended questions) */,
  "options" TEXT /* JSON array of options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "weighting_factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weighting factor for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_weighting_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("weighting_factor_id") REFERENCES weighting_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which this response belongs */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the respondent */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the respondent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "valid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the response is valid */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the response (e.g., web, mobile app, paper) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "demographic_info" TEXT /* Demographic information of the respondent (e.g., age, gender) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being analyzed */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses collected for the survey */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score calculated from the responses */,
  "weighted_value" REAL /* Weighted value of the survey based on certain criteria */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the target sample size that responded */,
  "segmentation" TEXT /* JSON object for demographic segmentation (e.g., age, gender, location) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the survey results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weighting_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighting factor */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with this factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weighting factor */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Numerical value of the weight */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the weighting factor is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the weighting factor was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the weighting factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weighting_factors_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_data" (
  "cumulative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cumulative record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with this record */,
  "cumulative_size" INTEGER /* Cumulative size of the sample */,
  "cumulative_value" REAL /* Cumulative weighted value of responses */,
  "segmentation" TEXT /* JSON object for demographic segmentation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the cumulative data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the survey */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the survey */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
